problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
